## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run -s build`
- [ ] `npm run -s test`
- [ ] `npm run -s lint`

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets/API keys added
- [ ] Inputs validated/sanitized for new code paths
- [ ] Logging avoids personal/sensitive document content
- [ ] Dependency changes reviewed for risk
- [ ] No production behavior hidden behind undocumented flags

## Risk and Rollback

- [ ] Risk level documented (low/medium/high)
- [ ] Rollback plan documented
